magic_stone_fragment.name: Magic Stone Fragment
magic_stone_fragment.description: A tiny, impure shard of crystallized mana.

magic_stone_small.name: Magic Stone (Small)
magic_stone_small.description: A small, cloudy stone of mana harvested from a low-level monster.

magic_stone_medium.name: Magic Stone (Medium)
magic_stone_medium.description: A decent-sized stone pulsating with the energy of the Veil.

magic_stone_large.name: Magic Stone (Large)
magic_stone_large.description: A heavy, fist-sized stone that hums with the raw power of the Sundering.

magic_stone_flawless.name: Magic Stone (Flawless)
magic_stone_flawless.description: A brilliant, pure crystal of condensed mana. The lifeblood of Astraeon.

ectoplasm.name: Ectoplasm
ectoplasm.description: A glowing, viscous substance left by spectral entities.

blood_shard.name: Blood Shard
blood_shard.description: A jagged crystal pulsing with a crimson light. It feels warm to the touch.

elemental_mote.name: Elemental Mote
elemental_mote.description: A flickering spark of raw elemental energy, unstable and valuable.

wolf_fang.name: Wolf Fang
wolf_fang.description: A sharp, unbroken fang from a forest wolf.

slime_gel.name: Slime Gel
slime_gel.description: Sticky, caustic residue from a slime.

spider_silk.name: Spider Silk
spider_silk.description: Strong, lightweight thread from a forest spider.

treant_branch.name: Treant Branch
treant_branch.description: A branch from a Treant, still thrumming with faint life magic.

boar_tusk.name: Corrupted Tusk
boar_tusk.description: A tusk from a Ravaged Boar.

boar_meat.name: Raw Boar Meat
boar_meat.description: A slab of meat from a wild boar.

boss_talon.name: Forest Boss Talon
boss_talon.description: A massive talon from a guardian of the forest.

medicinal_herb.name: Medicinal Herb
medicinal_herb.description: A common herb with slight healing properties.

iron_ore.name: Iron Ore
iron_ore.description: A chunk of raw iron suitable for smelting.

luminescent_crystal.name: Luminescent Crystal
luminescent_crystal.description: A crystal that glows with a cold inner light.

ancient_wood.name: Ancient Wood
ancient_wood.description: A dense piece of wood from an old tree.

bone_shard.name: Bone Shard
bone_shard.description: A sharp, jagged fragment of ancient bone.

grave_dust.name: Grave Dust
grave_dust.description: Cold, grey dust gathered from the deepest tombs.

necrotic_essence.name: Necrotic Essence
necrotic_essence.description: A swirling vial of death energy.

lich_skull.name: Lich Skull
lich_skull.description: The grinning skull of an undying mage, still whispering secrets.

coral_fragment.name: Coral Fragment
coral_fragment.description: A piece of colorful, hardened coral.

bioluminescent_scale.name: Bioluminescent Scale
bioluminescent_scale.description: A fish scale that glows faintly in the dark.

pearl.name: Pearl
pearl.description: A lustrous sphere formed inside a giant clam.

siren_voice_box.name: Siren Voice Box
siren_voice_box.description: An organ that can mimic any sound.

abyssal_pearl.name: Abyssal Pearl
abyssal_pearl.description: A pearl as black as the depths, radiating cold energy.

abyssal_ore.name: Abyssal Ore
abyssal_ore.description: A dense, light-absorbing ore found in the deepest chasms.

shadow_essence.name: Shadow Essence
shadow_essence.description: A vial of swirling darkness gathered from spirits.

mithril_ore.name: Mithril Ore
mithril_ore.description: Lightweight, silvery ore prized by smiths.

ironwood_heart.name: Ironwood Heart
ironwood_heart.description: The petrified heart of an Elder Treant.

crystal_heart.name: Crystal Heart
crystal_heart.description: The pulsating core of a crystalline construct.

titan_shard.name: Titan Shard
titan_shard.description: A fragment of metal so hard it feels impossible.

celestial_dust.name: Celestial Dust
celestial_dust.description: Glimmering dust that falls from the cracks in the sky, cold as the Void.

brass_gear.name: Brass Gear
brass_gear.description: A precisely machined gear that still spins on its own.

spring_coil.name: Spring Coil
spring_coil.description: A tense spring ready to snap.

steam_core.name: Steam Core
steam_core.description: A canister of pressurized steam and mana.

clockwork_heart.name: Clockwork Heart
clockwork_heart.description: The complex engine of a master automaton.

obsidian_shard.name: Obsidian Shard
obsidian_shard.description: A razor-sharp shard of volcanic glass.

fire_essence.name: Fire Essence
fire_essence.description: A flickering mote of elemental fire.

magma_core.name: Magma Core
magma_core.description: The cooling heart of a magma construct.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.description: A scale from a Lava Drake, hot to the touch.

frost_crystal.name: Frost Crystal
frost_crystal.description: A shard of ice that never melts.

winter_wolf_pelt.name: Winter Wolf Pelt
winter_wolf_pelt.description: Thick white fur, warm enough to survive the tundra.

ice_core.name: Ice Core
ice_core.description: The frozen heart of an ice construct.

void_dust.name: Void Dust
void_dust.description: A pile of fine, dark dust that drinks the light around it.

abyssal_shackle.name: Abyssal Shackle
abyssal_shackle.description: A broken chain link made of an unknown, cold metal.

entropy_crystal.name: Entropy Crystal
entropy_crystal.description: A crystal that constantly shifts its shape.

null_stone.name: Null Stone
null_stone.description: A heavy stone that feels like it weighs nothing. A paradox of the Void.

void_heart.name: Void Heart
void_heart.description: A pulsating core of pure nothingness. It hungers for the light.

ash_blossom.name: Ash Blossom
ash_blossom.description: A pale, hardy flower that grows in volcanic soil.

scorched_chitin.name: Scorched Chitin
scorched_chitin.description: A piece of insect shell, hardened by heat.

iron_ingot.name: Iron Ingot
iron_ingot.description: A solid bar of refined iron, ready for the forge.

steel_ingot.name: Steel Ingot
steel_ingot.description: An alloy of iron and carbon, harder and more durable.

refined_magic_stone.name: Refined Magic Stone
refined_magic_stone.description: A pure, cut stone that hums with stable mana.

cured_leather.name: Cured Leather
cured_leather.description: Tough, treated leather suitable for armor.

hardwood_plank.name: Hardwood Plank
hardwood_plank.description: A smooth, sturdy plank of ancient wood.

slag.name: Alchemical Slag
slag.description: A useless lump of burnt material from a failed experiment.

cloud_wisp.name: Cloud Wisp
cloud_wisp.description: A captured breath of living wind, soft to the touch.

griffon_feather.name: Griffon Feather
griffon_feather.description: A striped feather that hums with static electricity.

charged_core.name: Charged Core
charged_core.description: The sparking heart of a storm construct.

tempest_heart.name: Tempest Heart
tempest_heart.description: A swirling sphere of concentrated storm energy, dropped by a high guardian.

aether_stone.name: Aether Stone
aether_stone.description: A stone infused with the raw magic of the upper atmosphere.

star_metal_fragment.name: Star Metal Fragment
star_metal_fragment.description: A shard of metal that fell from the stars, cold and heavy.

ancient_tablet.name: Ancient Tablet
ancient_tablet.description: A stone tablet inscribed with pre-Sundering runes.

celestial_core.name: Celestial Core
celestial_core.description: The beating heart of a high-altitude construct.

prism_shard.name: Prism Shard
prism_shard.description: A sharp, multi-faceted shard that splits light into a rainbow.

concentrated_light.name: Concentrated Light
concentrated_light.description: A vial of blindingly bright liquid mana.

glass_heart.name: Glass Heart
glass_heart.description: The transparent core of a light-based entity, warm to the touch.

fulgurite_shard.name: Fulgurite Shard
fulgurite_shard.description: A jagged shard of glass formed by lightning striking sand.

rusted_scrap.name: Rusted Scrap
rusted_scrap.description: A piece of ancient, rusted metal. A skilled smith might refine it.

storm_essence.name: Storm Essence
storm_essence.description: A vial of crackling energy, collected from a storm elemental.

siren_scale.name: Siren Scale
siren_scale.description: A shimmering scale that reflects the colors of a stormy sea.

admiral_insignia.name: Admiral's Insignia
admiral_insignia.description: The tarnished badge of a long-dead admiral.

encrypted_log_cylinder.name: Encrypted Log Cylinder
encrypted_log_cylinder.description: A brass cylinder etched with code. It feels warm.

artificers_alloy.name: Artificer's Alloy
artificers_alloy.description: A bar of metal that seems to reshape itself slightly when touched.

heart_of_the_machine.name: Heart of the Machine
heart_of_the_machine.description: A pulsing core saved from a unique golem. It hums with gratitude.

primordial_ooze.name: Primordial Ooze
primordial_ooze.description: A sticky, glowing residue harvested from slimes.

brimstone.name: Brimstone
brimstone.description: A chunk of sulfurous rock that smells of rotten eggs.

lunawort.name: Lunawort
lunawort.description: A pale herb that only blooms under moonlight.

paper_scrap.name: Paper Scrap
paper_scrap.description: A tattered piece of parchment with illegible scribbles.

enchanted_ink.name: Enchanted Ink
enchanted_ink.description: Ink that shimmers with a faint, magical glow.

chronal_dust.name: Chronal Dust
chronal_dust.description: Glimmering sand that seems to fall upward.

perfected_glass.name: Perfected Glass
perfected_glass.description: An unbreakable pane of translucent material.

ancient_ourosan_coin.name: Ancient Ourosan Coin
ancient_ourosan_coin.description: Currency from a forgotten era, still holding strange power.

void_touched_relic.name: Void-Touched Relic
void_touched_relic.description: A dark, twisting artifact humming with abyssal energy.

refined_stone.name: Refined Stone
refined_stone.description: A perfectly cut block of stone, ready for construction.

treated_lumber.name: Treated Lumber
treated_lumber.description: Hardwood planks that have been treated to resist rot and fire.

stuffed_feral_stag_head.name: Stuffed Feral Stag Head
stuffed_feral_stag_head.description: A taxidermy trophy of a mighty Feral Stag. A testament to a hunter's prowess.

void_wraith_core_pedestal.name: Void Wraith Core Pedestal
void_wraith_core_pedestal.description: A dark, humming pedestal holding the trapped essence of a Void Wraith.

fungal_spores.name: Fungal Spores
fungal_spores.description: Spores harvested from the Fungal Hulk, carrying the strange ecology of The Undergrove.

bioluminescent_sap.name: Bioluminescent Sap
bioluminescent_sap.description: Glowing sap collected from flora and fauna of The Undergrove, pulsating with dim light.
